title: Version RAM Data Schema
description: Collection of RAM data for different game versions identified by product ID.

^[0-9A-Z]{4}$.description: Product ID that identifies game version

anchor.description: Sequence of hex strings used to identify the live main RAM block

anchor_offset.description: Hex offset between the anchor sequence and the beginning of the main RAM block

save_pointer_offset.description: Hex offset between the address of the save data pointer and the beginning of the main RAM block

money_offset.description: Hex offset between the beginning of the save data and the player's money value

trainer_id_offset.description: Hex offset between the beginning of the save data and the player's trainer ID value

party_size_offset.description: Hex offset between the beginning of the save data and the player's party size value
